title: Firing stand for shaped charges
abstract: A firing stand (30) for mounting a plurality of shaped charges. The firing stand (30) can be configured by a user between a transport configuration in which shaped charges are stored for transport, and at least a first firing configuration from which shaped charges can be deployed. Inter-connected rotating panels (31) may be used to provide user configurability to the firing stand (30), with shaped charges optionally being mounted in panel apertures (36). The firing stand provides for rapid and configurable deployment of multiple shaped charges.
claims: Claims 1. A firing stand for mounting a plurality of shaped charges, wherein the firing stand is user configurable between a transport configuration and at least a first firing configuration. 2. The firing stand of claim 1 wherein the stand comprises a plurality of mounting panels. 3. The firing stand of claim 2 wherein each mounting panel comprises a hinging means for attaching a first mounting panel in the plurality of mounting panels to a second mounting panel in the plurality of mounting panels. 4. The firing stand of claim 3 wherein the hinging means comprises a rod and eyelet interface. 5. The firing stand of any one of claims 3-4 wherein the hinging means comprises clamping means for fixing the relative orientation of the mounting panels. 6. The firing stand of claim 5 wherein the clamping means is finger adjustable. 7. The firing stand of any one of claims 2-6 wherein the mounting panels comprise a plurality of apertures for mounting a plurality of shaped charges. 8. The firing stand of any one of claims 2-7 further comprising a stand base. 9. The firing stand of claim 8 wherein the stand base comprises panel slots for holding the mounting panels. 10. The firing stand of any preceding claim substantially formed from an ammunition packaging material. 11. The firing stand of claim 10 wherein the ammunition packaging material is a low density plastazoate foam. 12. A shaped charge disruptor system comprising the firing stand of any preceding claim and a plurality of shaped charges. IB. The shaped charge disruptor system of claim 12 further comprising a precision initiation system. 14. A method of disrupting an explosive device, the method comprising the steps of: a. providing the shaped charge disruptor system of any one of claims 12-13; b. arranging the firing stand in the firing configuration such that the plurality of shaped charges are orientated towards the explosive device; and c. simultaneously initiating the plurality of shaped charges.
